characters.description: An Arbitage professor traveling under Vermil's identity with his students as he enters unsettled Linwick territory. Noah is protective of his pupils and wary of the noble family's internal struggle.
characters.name: Noah Vines

characters.description: Noah's close traveling companion, who accompanies him into Linwick territory with Todd and Isabel.
characters.name: Lee

characters.description: One of Noah's students, traveling with him into Linwick territory. Todd trains alongside Isabel and faces the disadvantages imposed on students without noble backing.
characters.name: Todd

characters.description: One of Noah's students and Todd's close training partner. Isabel enters Linwick territory with Noah's group.
characters.name: Isabel

characters.description: Vermil's elder brother and the group's Linwick escort. He brings Vermil before the family head.
characters.name: Brayden

characters.description: A rank-five member of a Linwick side branch who has returned from a long excursion and gathered support to challenge the family head. His rise makes the estate politically unstable.
characters.name: Dayton

characters.description: The calculating head of Vermil and Brayden's Linwick branch. He seeks proof that a demon occupies Vermil's body and discusses terms for possible cooperation.
characters.name: Father

characters.description: A fearful offshoot Linwick rune researcher ordered to answer Noah's questions about the family and its rivals.
characters.name: Janice

characters.description: An Arbitage magus who keeps Noah alive during his coma and safeguards his belongings while he recovers from grave injuries.
characters.name: Moxie

characters.description: Moxie's noble student, training with Todd and Isabel while Noah recovers.
characters.name: Emily

characters.description: A rank-three inquisitor who confronts Noah's group, claims a demon is among them, and confines them with anti-demon magic.
characters.name: Johan

characters.description: Johan's approaching rank-four inquisitor partner, whose work formed the containment dome around Noah's group.
characters.name: Inaros

characters.description: A goddess associated with the waters of life. She notices a brief contact with her power after Noah's failed rune formation and turns her attention toward the unidentified mortal responsible.
characters.name: Renewal

characters.description: A rank-two operative of the Torrin main branch who confronts Moxie on family orders. Her authority over Moxie makes her arrival an immediate threat to Noah's recovering group.
characters.name: Contessa

characters.description: An investigator assigned to the Hellreaver's unexplained death. Noah seeks Neir's permission before taking the students away from Arbitage for survival training.
characters.name: Neir

characters.description: Neir’s former teacher, a magus with a rune-engraved silver prosthetic leg who takes an interest in the unresolved Hellreaver investigation.
characters.name: Silvertide

characters.description: A rank-three Arbitage professor who prepares James for dangerous survival work through severe practical training.
characters.name: Revin

characters.description: Revin's rank-one student, a light and wind user preparing for the survival exam. His stealth and ranged attacks are tested under his godfather's harsh instruction.
characters.name: James

characters.description: A newly advanced rank-seven mage who completes the Consuming Flame of the Bloodied Lord after nearly a century of work. Garina defeats him and orders him to leave the Arbalest Empire.
characters.name: Alistair

characters.description: A rank-seven enforcer who expels a newly advanced mage from the Arbalest Empire. She acts with overwhelming authority and asks about a person who cannot remain dead.
characters.name: Garina

characters.description: A silver-haired woman presenting herself as a concealed Torrin main-branch student. She intercepts Contessa's search for Moxie and insists on taking charge of the pursuit.
characters.name: Bria

characters.description: A formidable Torrin rival. Dayton fears her and believes she can call forth a demon.
characters.name: Magus Evergreen

characters.description: A guarded member of the Linwick main branch who has recently returned from secluded meditation. She is hostile toward Vermil and previously sent him a gift.
characters.name: Karina

characters.description: The real Torrin participant whose appearance Karina previously borrowed.
characters.name: Eline

characters.description: A Torrin main-branch assassin associated with Eline. Karina identifies him as a likely threat at the survival exam, where his attention may fall on Moxie.
characters.name: Garrick

characters.description: The Arbitage magus who starts the final survival exam and dispatches student teams into Snowfield through a transport cannon.
characters.name: Magus Tenfort

characters.description: A demon who emerges from Noah's soul, attacks Magus Evergreen, and claims that Noah's healing restored its fragmented soul.
characters.name: The Demon

characters.description: A rank-five demon who emerges from Noah's soul and claims the original Vermil summoned him. His name becomes known as Noah investigates the bond that prevents either of them from separating safely.
characters.name: Azel

characters.description: A powerful representative of the Great Church of Repose who enters the survival-exam grounds in search of a large city where he can ask questions. He easily overcomes Tenfort's attempt to enforce neutrality.
characters.name: Ferdinand
